6:["$","li",null,{"children":"Fly CLI installed and authenticated"}]
7:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"flyctl"}]," version 0.2.0 or higher"]}]
8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Setup"}]
9:["$","h3",null,{"children":"1. Create App"}]
a:["$","$L1e",null,{"code":"fly apps create mnemosyne-api\n","language":"bash"}]
b:["$","h3",null,{"children":"2. Create Volume"}]
c:["$","$L1e",null,{"code":"fly volumes create mnemosyne_data --size 10 --region ord\n","language":"bash"}]
d:["$","h3",null,{"children":"3. fly.toml"}]
e:["$","$L1e",null,{"code":"app = \"mnemosyne-api\"\nprimary_region = \"ord\"\n\n[build]\ndockerfile = \"Dockerfile\"\n\n[mounts]\nsource = \"mnemosyne_data\"\ndestination = \"/data\"\n\n[env]\nMNEMOSYNE_DB_PATH = \"/data/mnemosyne.db\"\nMNEMOSYNE_HOST = \"0.0.0.0\"\nMNEMOSYNE_PORT = \"8080\"\n\n[http_service]\ninternal_port = 8080\nforce_https = true\nauto_stop_machines = true\nauto_start_machines = true\nmin_machines_running = 0\n","language":"toml"}]
f:["$","h3",null,{"children":"4. Dockerfile"}]
10:["$","$L1e",null,{"code":"FROM python:3.12-slim\n\nWORKDIR /app\nCOPY requirements.txt .\nRUN pip install -r requirements.txt\n\nCOPY . .\nEXPOSE 8080\n\nCMD [\"python\", \"-m\", \"mnemosyne.server\"]\n","language":"dockerfile"}]
11:["$","h3",null,{"children":"5. Deploy"}]
12:["$","$L1e",null,{"code":"fly deploy\n","language":"bash"}]
13:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Scaling"}]
14:["$","$L1e",null,{"code":"# Scale to 2 machines\nfly scale count 2\n\n# Scale memory\nfly scale memory 512\n","language":"bash"}]
15:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Monitoring"}]
16:["$","$L1e",null,{"code":"# Logs\nfly logs\n\n# Status\nfly status\n\n# Metrics\nfly metrics\n","language":"bash"}]
